design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → hero=workflow-command-center, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], gsap=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: hero attention, proof interest, workflow desire, CTA action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk via Fontshare. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline spans 2–3 lines at 1120px max. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary CTA black pill, secondary white pill, contrast verified.
headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling AI assistant
real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A premium, field‑guide landing page showing how real estate agents use Super’s personal AI agents to handle follow‑ups, listing updates, and scheduling across real apps — with reusable computer‑use cache advantages for repeated workflows.
